record.field: AI-powered platform built exclusively for Odoo ERP customization and module development.

What is DearERP?

DearERP is an AI-powered Odoo development platform that transforms how businesses build, customize, and extend their Odoo ERP systems.

  • Purpose-built for Odoo — Not a generic AI tool adapted for Odoo; built from the ground up with deep Odoo framework knowledge
  • End-to-end module development — From requirement gathering to production-ready code
  • Version-aware — Supports Odoo versions 14 through 19 with automatic compatibility handling
  • Instance-connected — Connects to your live Odoo instance to understand existing models, fields, and configurations
Odoo partners, implementers, in-house teams, and freelancers who need rapid customization.

Who Benefits from DearERP?

  • Odoo Partners & Integrators — Deliver client projects 5-10x faster with production-quality code
  • In-house IT Teams — Customize Odoo without deep framework expertise
  • Freelance Odoo Developers — Take on more projects with AI-assisted development
  • Business Analysts — Translate requirements directly into working modules
  • Odoo Consultants — Prototype and demonstrate solutions in real-time during client meetings
Describe your requirements in plain language, and DearERP generates complete, validated Odoo modules.

How DearERP Works

  1. Describe Your Need — Tell DearERP what you need in plain English (or any language)
  2. AI Analyzes & Plans — DearERP understands Odoo's architecture and plans the optimal solution
  3. Code Generation — Complete module with models, views, security, tests, and data files
  4. Validation & Testing — Automated checks for Odoo best practices and compatibility
  5. Ready to Install — Download and install on your Odoo instance immediately
Save 70-90% development time, reduce errors, and deliver consistent quality.

Why DearERP?

  • 70-90% Time Savings — What takes days manually takes minutes with DearERP
  • Zero Odoo Expertise Required — Business users can describe needs in plain language
  • Production-Ready Output — Generated code follows Odoo best practices and coding standards
  • Consistent Quality — Every module follows the same high standards
  • Version Compatible — Automatic handling of version-specific differences
  • Instant Validation — Built-in checks catch issues before deployment
Scaffold complete modules with one command — models, views, security, tests, and icons included.

Intelligent Module Scaffolding

Generate complete Odoo module structures with a single command:

  • Support for 8 module archetypes: basic, wizard, report, website, cron, inherit, api, widget
  • Automatic mixin integration (mail, portal, image, rating, website, sequence)
  • Security groups and record rules generation
  • Custom model names, dependencies, and metadata
  • Version-aware output (Odoo 14-19)
Connects to your Odoo instance to understand existing models, fields, and installed modules.

Live Instance Intelligence

DearERP connects to your running Odoo instance to:

  • Discover installed modules and their models
  • Inspect field definitions and relationships
  • Understand existing customizations
  • Avoid creating duplicate fields — reuses existing ones
  • Generate accurate inheritance and extension code

All connections are read-only for safety.
Validates modules against Odoo best practices with automatic fixing of common issues.

Automated Validation & Auto-Fix

  • Checks manifest completeness and dependency accuracy
  • Validates XML view syntax and field references
  • Verifies security model (access rules, record rules)
  • Detects breaking changes between versions
  • Auto-fixes common issues (view type renames, Bootstrap updates, etc.)
  • Live validation against running Odoo instances
Migrate modules between Odoo versions with compatibility checks and auto-fixes.

Version Migration Support

  • Check module compatibility between any two versions
  • Automatic detection of deprecated APIs and methods
  • Auto-fix migration issues where possible
  • Field-level diff comparison between versions
  • Comprehensive migration report with actionable items
Inspect any Odoo model and its fields across versions or live instances.

Field & Model Inspection

  • Check fields for any model in the Odoo reference
  • Compare fields between Odoo versions
  • Look up model definitions and inheritance chains
  • Live field resolution from running instances
  • Detect custom vs. standard fields
Generate modules compatible with any Odoo version from 14 to 19.

Multi-Version Support

DearERP supports all modern Odoo versions:

  • Odoo 14 — Community & Enterprise
  • Odoo 15 — Community & Enterprise
  • Odoo 16 — Community & Enterprise
  • Odoo 17 — Community & Enterprise (OWL 2 support)
  • Odoo 18 — Community & Enterprise
  • Odoo 19 — Community & Enterprise (latest)

Version-specific syntax, APIs, and best practices are automatically applied.
Every module includes comprehensive tests to ensure reliability and correctness.

Automated Test Generation

  • TransactionCase tests for model logic
  • HttpCase tests for controllers and UI
  • Security access tests
  • Workflow and business logic tests
  • Tests are run and verified before delivery
Every module includes proper security groups, access rules, and record rules.

Security-First Approach

  • Automatic security group generation
  • Proper ir.model.access.csv for all models
  • Record rules for multi-company and user-based access
  • No security vulnerabilities (SQL injection, XSS protection)
  • Read-only instance connections — never modifies your data
Describe what you need in plain English — no technical jargon required.

Natural Language Requirements

Simply describe what you need:

  • "I need a module to track employee training certifications"
  • "Add a custom field to sales orders for delivery priority"
  • "Create a dashboard showing monthly revenue by product category"
  • "Build a wizard to bulk-update customer payment terms"

DearERP translates your business requirements into technical Odoo specifications automatically.
Cursor is a general-purpose AI code editor. DearERP is purpose-built for Odoo with deep framework knowledge.
Deep Odoo ORM knowledge, automatic manifest management, version-aware code, live instance connectivity, built-in validation

DearERP vs Cursor AI

CapabilityCursor AIDearERP
Odoo ORM Knowledge❌ Generic Python only✅ Deep ORM expertise
Module Structure❌ Manual setup✅ Auto-scaffolding
View Architecture❌ Basic XML✅ Full Odoo view system
Security Model❌ Not aware✅ Auto-generated
Version Compatibility❌ No version awareness✅ Odoo 14-19 support
Live Instance Connection❌ Not available✅ Read existing data
Module Validation❌ None✅ Built-in validator
Migration Support❌ None✅ Auto-migration
Odoo.sh AI is limited to basic operations. DearERP generates complete custom modules from scratch.
Full module generation, complex business logic, custom models, multi-version support, no Odoo.sh subscription required

DearERP vs Odoo.sh AI

CapabilityOdoo.sh AIDearERP
Custom Module Creation❌ Limited✅ Full modules
Complex Business Logic❌ Basic only✅ Any complexity
Custom Models❌ Studio-level✅ Full Python models
Works with Community❌ Enterprise only✅ Both editions
Self-hosted Support❌ Odoo.sh only✅ Any hosting
Test Generation❌ None✅ Automatic tests
CostIncluded in Odoo.sh planStandalone subscription
General AI assistants produce fragmented, often incorrect Odoo code. DearERP delivers complete, validated modules.
Complete module output (not snippets), validated code, proper Odoo conventions, no hallucinated APIs, version-specific accuracy

DearERP vs ChatGPT / GitHub Copilot

CapabilityChatGPT / CopilotDearERP
Output TypeCode snippetsComplete modules
Odoo Accuracy⚠️ Often incorrect✅ Validated output
API Hallucination⚠️ Common problem✅ Reference-checked
File Structure❌ User must organize✅ Auto-structured
Manifest Management❌ Manual✅ Automatic
Security Files❌ Often forgotten✅ Always included
Context Continuity❌ Loses context✅ Project-aware
Studio is great for simple customizations. DearERP handles complex logic that Studio cannot.
Complex business logic, custom reports, API integrations, advanced security, multi-model workflows, no Enterprise license needed

DearERP vs Odoo Studio

CapabilityOdoo StudioDearERP
Simple Field Addition✅ Drag & drop✅ Code-based
Complex Business Logic❌ Very limited✅ Full Python
Custom Reports⚠️ Basic✅ Advanced QWeb
API Integrations❌ Not possible✅ Full support
Custom Wizards❌ Not supported✅ Full wizard support
Performance⚠️ Can be slow✅ Optimized code
Portability⚠️ Export issues✅ Standard modules
Community Edition❌ Enterprise only✅ Both editions
Build multi-level approval workflows with company-specific rules, escalation paths, and audit trails.

Multi-Company Approval Workflows

Challenge: A holding company needs different approval hierarchies for purchase orders across 5 subsidiaries, with cross-company escalation and complete audit trails.

Traditional Approach: 2-3 weeks of development, complex record rules, custom state machines.

With DearERP: Describe the workflow in plain language. DearERP generates the complete module with:

  • Multi-level approval engine with configurable thresholds per company
  • Cross-company escalation paths
  • Complete audit trail with chatter integration
  • Email notifications at each approval stage
  • Dashboard for pending approvals across all companies

Time saved: 2-3 weeks → 1-2 hours
Integrate Odoo with external APIs like payment gateways, shipping carriers, or CRM platforms.

Third-Party API Integration

Challenge: Integrate Odoo with a custom logistics API for real-time shipment tracking, automated carrier selection, and rate comparison.

Traditional Approach: 3-4 weeks involving API documentation study, connector development, error handling, and testing.

With DearERP:

  • API connector with proper authentication handling
  • Scheduled cron jobs for data synchronization
  • Error handling and retry logic
  • Configuration wizard for API credentials
  • Real-time webhooks support
  • Logging and monitoring dashboard

Time saved: 3-4 weeks → 2-3 hours
Create complex PDF/Excel reports with dynamic filters, cross-model aggregation, and charts.

Advanced Custom Reporting

Challenge: Create a comprehensive financial report that aggregates data from Sales, Purchase, and Accounting modules with dynamic date filters, comparison periods, and multi-currency support.

With DearERP:

  • QWeb PDF reports with professional layouts
  • Dynamic wizard for filter selection
  • Cross-model data aggregation using SQL views
  • Multi-currency conversion
  • Period-over-period comparison
  • Export to Excel capability

Time saved: 1-2 weeks → 1-2 hours
Build customer/vendor portals with document submission, approval tracking, and self-service features.

Custom Portal with Self-Service

Challenge: Build a vendor portal where suppliers can submit invoices, track payment status, update their information, and download statements — all with proper security isolation.

With DearERP:

  • Website controllers for portal pages
  • Portal mixin integration for access control
  • Document upload and management
  • Real-time status tracking
  • Self-service profile management
  • Multi-company portal isolation

Time saved: 3-4 weeks → 3-4 hours
Build custom frontend widgets, interactive dashboards, and OWL components for the Odoo backend.

Custom OWL Widgets & Components

Challenge: Create an interactive Kanban-style project dashboard with drag-and-drop, real-time updates, custom visualizations, and embedded charts.

With DearERP:

  • OWL 2 components (Odoo 17+) or legacy widgets (Odoo 14-16)
  • Custom form widgets for specialized inputs
  • Interactive charts and visualizations
  • Real-time updates via bus notifications
  • Responsive design for mobile compatibility

Time saved: 2-3 weeks → 2-3 hours
Migrate custom modules between Odoo versions with automatic compatibility fixes and validation.

Version Migration

Challenge: Migrate 15 custom modules from Odoo 16 to Odoo 18, handling all breaking changes, deprecated APIs, and view syntax changes.

With DearERP:

  • Automatic detection of all breaking changes
  • View type rename migration (list views)
  • Bootstrap 4 → 5 class updates
  • Deprecated API replacement
  • OWL 1 → OWL 2 component migration
  • Comprehensive migration report

Time saved: Weeks of manual work → hours with auto-fix
Perfect for freelancers and small teams getting started with AI-assisted Odoo development.

• ✅ Module scaffolding (all archetypes)
  • ✅ Module validation
  • ✅ Single Odoo version support
  • ✅ Basic field inspection
  • ✅ Email support
  • ❌ Live instance connection
  • ❌ Migration support
  • ❌ Priority support

Starter Plan

Ideal for individual developers and small teams just beginning their AI-assisted Odoo development journey.

Includes core scaffolding, validation, and single-version support to help you build modules faster.
Best for Odoo partners and growing teams needing full development capabilities.

• ✅ Everything in Starter
  • ✅ Multi-version support (Odoo 14-19)
  • ✅ Live instance connection
  • ✅ Migration support
  • ✅ Advanced field & model inspection
  • ✅ Auto-fix capabilities
  • ✅ Priority email support
  • ❌ Custom training

Professional Plan

The most popular choice for Odoo implementation partners and mid-size teams.

Unlocks the full power of DearERP including live instance intelligence, multi-version support, and migration tools.
For large organizations and Odoo partners needing unlimited capacity and premium support.

• ✅ Everything in Professional
  • ✅ Unlimited module generation
  • ✅ Custom training sessions
  • ✅ Dedicated account manager
  • ✅ SLA-backed support
  • ✅ Custom integrations
  • ✅ On-premise deployment option
  • ✅ Early access to new features

Enterprise Plan

Designed for large Odoo partners and enterprises with high-volume development needs.

Includes unlimited usage, premium support with SLA, custom training, and a dedicated account manager.
